basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
basic_details.department: Department of Astronomy, Astrophysics and Space Engineering
basic_details.short_information: IIT Indore is recruiting 1 JRF post under DAE-BRNS project with Master's degree qualification. Last date 15-07-2026 or until fulfilled.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 30 years (Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female candidates)
qualification.education_qualification: Minimum first class Master's degree in Electronics / Electrical / Mechanical / Computer Engineering or in relevant branch of Engineering or Science.

vacancy_details.details: A total of 01 vacancy has been announced for the post of Junior Research Fellow under the DAE-BRNS project.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates are requested to submit a detailed softcopy of their CV along with all relevant Essential Qualification Degree Certificates, Mark Sheets, GATE qualifying certificates (if any), Date of Birth Proof Certificate in a single PDF file to [email protected] with the subject line "BRNS JRF application".
Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an online interview. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidate will be intimated by email. Shortlisted candidates will have to appear for an online interview. No TA/DA will be paid for the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Indore JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates are requested to submit a detailed softcopy of their CV along with all relevant Essential Qualification Degree Certificates, Mark Sheets, GATE qualifying certificates (if any), Date of Birth Proof Certificate in a single PDF file to [email protected] with the subject line "BRNS JRF application" . Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an online interview. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in the interview.

content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidate will be intimated by email. Shortlisted candidates will have to appear for an online interview. No TA/DA will be paid for the interview.

faq.question: Q1. What is the IIT Indore JRF recruitment 2026 for?
faq.answer: IIT Indore is inviting applications for one Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in the Department of Astronomy, Astrophysics and Space Engineering, for a DAE-BRNS funded project on developing the telescope and observatory control system for a 0.5 m Cassegrain telescope.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IIT Indore JRF recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is 15 July 2026, or until the position is filled, whichever is earlier.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for IIT Indore JRF (BRNS) recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need a minimum first-class Master's degree in Electronics, Electrical, Mechanical, or Computer Engineering, or a relevant branch of Engineering or Science, as defined by IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IIT Indore JRF recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years, with a 3-year relaxation for OBC candidates and a 5-year relaxation for SC/ST, Physically Handicapped, and female candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the JRF fellowship amount at IIT Indore?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 37,000 per month for the first and second years of the fellowship.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the IIT Indore JRF (Astronomy, Astrophysics and Space Engineering) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must email a detailed CV along with essential qualification certificates, mark sheets, GATE qualifying certificate, and date of birth proof as a single PDF to [email protected], with the subject line "BRNS JRF application."

faq.question: Q7. When will the IIT Indore JRF interview be held?
faq.answer: The first round of interviews is tentatively scheduled for the second half of July 2026, and only shortlisted candidates will be notified by email.
